title: Perform tissue or cell culture techniques
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform tissue or cell culture techniques demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Interpret and schedule production requirements

pcs.text: Review client request and confirm quantity and nature of cells or tissue
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review client request and confirm quantity and nature of cells or tissue?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review client request and confirm quantity and nature of cells or tissue.

pcs.text: Select appropriate media, materials, equipment and methods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select appropriate media, materials, equipment and methods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select appropriate media, materials, equipment and methods.

pcs.text: Plan parallel work sequences to optimise production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Plan parallel work sequences to optimise production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Plan parallel work sequences to optimise production.

pcs.text: Maintain a chain of custody, traceable to the worker, for all cells or tissues
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain a chain of custody, traceable to the worker, for all cells or tissues?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain a chain of custody, traceable to the worker, for all cells or tissues.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and workplace control measures associated with the sample, preparation methods, reagents and equipment.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Address hazards and incidents as they arise in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Safely dispose of biohazardous materials and other laboratory waste.
